modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Package delivered to the wrong department.

full_description_text: 
A package was received by our department.  
It was intended for another department.  
This situation needs to be addressed promptly.  
Clarification on the delivery process may be required.
short_description: Package delivered to the wrong department.
description:
